changelog: Add: Servers page — manage this server and remote servers from the UI
Add: stor-agent — lightweight management daemon for remote Linux servers
Add: Auto-install agent on remote servers via SSH or manual API key registration
Add: Per-server CPU/memory/disk/network metrics with 30s auto-refresh
Add: OS package updates (apt), reboot, and St0r/UrBackup updates per server
Fix: Settings page — removed 'Automatic Backup Database Repair' checkbox (autoshutdown key is read-only in UrBackup and was mislabeled)
Fix: File Browser — replaced backup card grid with calendar date picker
